brand.fixed_layout: 상단 3/5 이미지 + 하단 2/5 검정 텍스트 영역

layout.top: 3/5 — AI 생성 이미지 (인물+배경). 실존 인물은 사용자가 미리캔버스에서 합성.
layout.bottom: 2/5 — 순수 검정(#000000). 사용자가 미리캔버스에서 텍스트 배치.
layout.prompt_rule: 프롬프트에 'The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements' 반드시 포함

benchmark_analysis.text_layout: 2-line structure: large bold keyword dominant, bottom-half text placement
benchmark_analysis.color_tone: pastel/soft or simple monochrome — avoid dark dramatic tones
benchmark_analysis.art_style: illustration/anime strongly preferred over photorealistic — faceless or simplified characters common
benchmark_analysis.face_style: simplified characters (no faces or stick figures), avoid exaggerated expressions
benchmark_analysis.notes: Psychology channel thumbnails in Korea heavily favor illustration style. Simple character designs (blue blob, stick figures) over realistic faces. Soft warm tones dominate.
